sizing_rule.note: Position size must be determined by geometric mean maximization (optimal f) across probability-weighted P&L outcomes. The exact optimal_f value is derived via Equation 4.16 and adjusts dynamically as trade probabilities change. This is the core sizing principle from Vince's money management framework.

source_rule_text: Always decide position sizing based on geometric mean maximization to optimize long-run growth of capital, adjusting the optimal fraction as probabilities change with each trade.
